title: The Unsolved Murder of Judy Smith

scenes.text: A woman's murder remains a chilling enigma decades later.
This haunting case unfolded in Raleigh, North Carolina, in 1980.
Judy Smith was found dead, but the culprit has never been identified.
The investigation turned cold, leaving haunting questions behind.
scenes.label: CASE UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow if you can't stop asking why.

description: 📍 Raleigh, USA - 1980. The murder of Judy Smith remains a haunting unsolved case, with the killer still unidentified after decades. Follow for daily mysteries!
